political.s: Via parent company Coca-Cola: FEC: $252K in executive political donations; partisan lean split across 14 executive donors.  [CA CalAccess + NY COELIG + TX Ethics adds state-level totals.]

labor.s: Via parent company Coca-Cola: 123 federal penalties totaling $265.8M since 2000 (Violation Tracker). Supply-chain signals: KnowTheChain 58/100; CHRB 13.8/26; TVPRA exposure; UK MS statement; AU MS statement.

charity.s: Via parent company Coca-Cola: $165M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.36% of revenue) via Coca-Cola Foundation. Drucker Institute Management Top 250 — ranked #13 (2024) on customer satisfaction, employee engagement, innovation, social responsibility, and financial strength. Fortune World's Most Admired Companies — ranked #19 (2024). Newsweek Most Trustworthy Companies in America — ranked #5 (2024). Operates the The Coca-Cola Foundation Inc: $95.9M in charitable contributions, gifts & grants paid (FY2023, IRS Form 990-PF).

dei.s: Via parent company Coca-Cola: HRC Corporate Equality Index: 100/100 — Equality 100 Leader (2025). Top-rated LGBTQ+ workplace policies, benefits, and culture. Bloomberg Gender-Equality Index member (2024) — transparent on female leadership, equal pay, inclusive culture. HRC Corporate Equality Index 100/100 (2025) — top-tier LGBTQ+ workplace equality rating.

animals.s: Via parent company Coca-Cola: Ethical Consumer Avoid — environment + plastic-pollution + tax + political-donations concerns. [ethical-consumer]

execPay.s: Via parent company Coca-Cola: CEO-to-median-worker pay ratio 739:1 (median employee pay $17,947) — SEC proxy statement (DEF 14A, 2026).

wiki.extract: Gold Peak Tea is a brand of ready-to-drink iced tea manufactured by The Coca-Cola Company. It was first introduced in 2006 while a chilled version was launched in 2009. Past formulations of the product had won the ChefsBest award for best taste when it was made with tea leaves from the Kenyan Rift Valley. As of 2019, Gold Peak tea is no longer made from concentrate and is now brewed and bottled in their juice plants.

health.s: Via parent company Coca-Cola: 3 CPSC recalls on record; sample hazard: the inner wall of the double-walled glasses can break easily.
